title: Long suffix 'L' should be upper case
description: This rule checks that the long suffix 'L' in variable names follows the Python style guide and is uppercase.
message: Variable name '{{ variable_name }}' has a long suffix 'L' that is not uppercase.
recommendation: Rename the variable to follow the Python style guide.
why_is_this_an_issue: Following the Python style guide ensures consistency and readability.
how_to_fix: Rename the variable to have an uppercase 'L' in the long suffix.

metadata.title: Long suffix 'L' should be upper case
